channel.title: flove making-of — features questions
channel.description: New features design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should trusty implement crumbly granular mode?
item.description:
• Implement — Full granular mode — fine-grained permissions per element. Complex but powerful. • Discard — Skip granular mode — keep crumbly simple. Less complexity, less power. • Defer — Don't decide now — revisit when crumbly is actually used.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
